title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
